scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c green,blue "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.lint: npm --workspace @bidatlas/frontend run lint && npm --workspace @bidatlas/infra run typecheck && python -m ruff check backend/app backend/tests
scripts.test: npm --workspace @bidatlas/frontend run test && python -m pytest backend/tests
scripts.deploy:aws: npm run build && npm --workspace @bidatlas/infra run deploy
scripts.synth:aws: npm run build && npm --workspace @bidatlas/infra run synth
